case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS SOLON, DOMINGO

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SOLON, DOMINGO
